keys.page:about: {"version":"1.0","slug":"about","title":"About","blocks":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567801","blockType":"blob","data":{"eyebrow":"About","title":"A shared framework for corporate climate accountability. ","subtitle":"The Climate Contribution Framework (CCF) was established to address a growing accountability gap: while companies increasingly disclose their emissions and transition plans, their overall contribution to global Net Zero remains fragmented, difficult to compare, and undervalued.","showContent":"false","figureType":"none","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"8xl","paddingX":"container-xl","paddingY":"9xl","headerPaddingX":"container-sm"}}},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567803","blockType":"blob","data":{"eyebrow":"Origin of the framework","title":"Co-initiated by Sweep and the Mirova Research Center.","subtitle":"Together, these organizations combine sustainable financial research, data insights, and operational expertise to build the market infrastructure that was missing: a robust, transparent, and scalable framework that goes beyond methodology to enable meaningful, comparable climate contribution across companies and sectors.","showContent":"true","contentType":"innerBlocks","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"2xl","gapY":"3xl","paddingX":"container-md","paddingY":"5xl","headerPaddingX":"container-md"}}},"innerBlocks":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567803a","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-2","iteratorGapX":"md","iteratorGapY":"none","appearance":"outlined","itemFields":["title","subtitle","align"],"items":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567803a-item-1773239179660-ry6spnj","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Sweep","subtitle":"Sweep is the leading sustainability data management platform. Its AI-powered software helps organizations understand all extra-financial data across their business and value chain to manage disclosure requirements and take action to meet sustainable business goals. Trusted by global enterprises and financial institutions including L'Oréal, Lacoste, and Hewlett Packard, Sweep is B Corp certified and recognized as a leader by Verdantix, IDC, and MEDEF.","align":"right"},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567803a-item-1773239179660-75p1nl6","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Mirova Research Center","subtitle":"The Mirova Research Center is an excellence research center dedicated to enhancing methods and tools for sustainable finance, established in September 2024. Its goal is to support academic research through funding and promoting innovative, high-impact topics for the industry and society, creating a space for exchange between the academic world and the financial sector. MRC focuses on three areas: impact indicators for a just transition, investors' contribution to the SDGs, and AI & technology innovation for sustainable finance."},"innerBlocks":[]}],"markerType":"text","markerStyle":"secondary","markerContent":" ","responsive":{"base":{"align":"left","size":"md","gapY":"sm","paddingX":"md","paddingY":"md","direction":"default"}}}},{"id":"block-1773224045789-kh1orafi7","blockType":"blob","data":{"showContent":true,"contentType":"text","contentText":"Scientific development was carried out in collaboration with I Care by BearingPoint and Winrock International.","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","direction":"default","align":"center","size":"md","paddingY":"none"}}},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"block-1773609271150-bp0m0qj07","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-2","iteratorGapX":"md","iteratorGapY":"none","appearance":"outlined","itemFields":["title","subtitle","align"],"items":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567803a-item-1773239179660-ry6spnj","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"I Care by BearingPoint","subtitle":"I Care by BearingPoint is a leader in impact-driven transformation and BearingPoint's center of expertise for sustainable development. From strategy to implementation, its experts deliver concrete and innovative transition solutions for companies, financial institutions, and public organizations, combining technical expertise across climate, biodiversity, circular economy, and social impact with transformational know-how. With over 200 specialized consultants, I Care is a key player in sustainability consulting globally","align":"right"},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567803a-item-1773239179660-75p1nl6","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Winrock International.","subtitle":"Winrock International is a recognized leader in the U.S. and globally, providing solutions to some of the world's most complex social and agricultural challenges. Its mission is to empower the disadvantaged, increase economic opportunity, and sustain natural resources. Winrock combines scientific and technical expertise with entrepreneurial innovation to deliver market-based solutions, partnering with communities, governments, and businesses across more than 60 countries."},"innerBlocks":[]}],"markerType":"text","markerStyle":"secondary","markerContent":" ","responsive":{"base":{"align":"left","size":"md","gapY":"sm","paddingX":"md","paddingY":"md"}}}},{"id":"block-1773224105049-dzn72b95n","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-4","iteratorGapX":"xs","iteratorGapY":"md","itemFields":["title","emphasisText","eyebrow","eyebrowTheme","subtitle","markerContent","markerIcon","buttons","contentText","image"],"figureType":"image","image":"/placeholder-135x400.svg","items":[{"id":"block-1773224105049-dzn72b95n-item-1773239179660-4vu4ld2","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"","emphasisText":"","eyebrow":"","eyebrowTheme":"","subtitle":"","markerContent":"","markerIcon":"","buttons":"","contentText":""},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"block-1773224105049-dzn72b95n-item-1773239179660-7db4frl","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"","emphasisText":"","eyebrow":"","eyebrowTheme":"","subtitle":"","markerContent":"","markerIcon":"","buttons":"","contentText":""},"innerBlocks":[]}],"responsive":{"base":{"gapX":"none","gapY":"none","paddingX":"5xl","paddingY":"none"}}}}]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567805","blockType":"blob","data":{"eyebrow":"Partners","title":"Co-built with leading experts //and corporate insights","subtitle":"The framework was co-built with eleven major companies representing diverse sectors and positions in value chain. These companies have provided their expertise, tested early versions of the methodology, and helped ensure its relevance to real corporate strategies.","showContent":"true","contentType":"innerBlocks","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"xl","gapY":"xl","paddingX":"container-lg","paddingY":"3xl","headerPaddingX":"container-md"}}},"innerBlocks":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567805a","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-5","iteratorGapX":"sm","iteratorGapY":"sm","figureType":"image","image":"/placeholder-135x400.svg","items":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567805a-item-1773239179660-19yzf8b","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567805a-item-1773239179660-e2ouww9","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567805a-item-1773239179660-s8fsvxs","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567805a-item-1773239179660-e40u5cp","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567805a-item-1773239179660-h2pb3ge","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]}],"itemFields":["title","emphasisText","eyebrow","eyebrowTheme","subtitle","markerContent","markerIcon","buttons","contentText"],"responsive":{"base":{"gapX":"none","gapY":"none","paddingX":"none","paddingY":"none"}}}},{"id":"block-1773223754505-9sxf4mzyc","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-5","iteratorGapX":"sm","iteratorGapY":"sm","figureType":"image","image":"/placeholder-135x400.svg","items":[{"id":"block-1773223754505-9sxf4mzyc-item-1773239179661-v93ujwt","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"block-1773223754505-9sxf4mzyc-item-1773239179661-n6jao1e","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"block-1773223754505-9sxf4mzyc-item-1773239179661-zaqmdl7","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"block-1773223754505-9sxf4mzyc-item-1773239179661-y40cr2w","blockType":"blob","data":{},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"block-1773223754505-9sxf4mzyc-item-1773239179661 rigor, and transparency.","subtitle":"The Climate Contribution Framework is governed by a multi-layered structure designed to ensure scientific credibility, methodological independence, transparency towards markets, and openness to stakeholder feedback.","showContent":"true","contentType":"innerBlocks","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"2xl","gapY":"3xl","paddingX":"container-lg","paddingY":"5xl","headerPaddingX":"container-md"}}},"innerBlocks":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567806a","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-3","iteratorGapX":"md","iteratorGapY":"md","markerType":"none","markerStyle":"secondary","appearance":"default","itemFields":["title","subtitle","contentText"],"items":[{"id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567806a-item-1773239179662-u4u5asd","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"The {"version":"1.0","slug":"resources","title":"Resources","blocks":[{"id":"reso-0001-hero-0000-0000-000000000001","blockType":"blob","data":{"eyebrow":"Resources","title":"Publications, methodology // and updates.","subtitle":"Whether you are a company, investor, public decision-maker, or analyst, these resources help you understand how contribution is measured, and how the framework evolves.","showContent":"false","figureType":"none","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"8xl","paddingX":"container-xl","paddingY":"9xl","headerPaddingX":"container-sm"}}},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-0000-0000-000000000002","blockType":"blob","data":{"eyebrow":"The White Paper","title":"The complete methodology // in one reference document.","subtitle":"The White Paper presents the complete architecture of the Climate Contribution Framework, from founding rationale to development prospects.","buttons":"[{\"label\":\"Download the White Paper\",\"variant\":\"default\",\"theme\":\"default\",\"linkType\":\"internal\",\"internalHref\":\"\",\"opensInNewTab\":\"false\"},{\"label\":\"Read the executive summary\",\"variant\":\"ghost\",\"theme\":\"default\",\"linkType\":\"internal\",\"internalHref\":\"\",\"opensInNewTab\":\"false\"}]","showContent":"true","contentType":"innerBlocks","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"2xl","gapY":"3xl","paddingX":"container-lg","paddingY":"6xl","headerPaddingX":"container-md"}}},"innerBlocks":[{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-iter-0000-000000000002a","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-3","iteratorGapX":"auto","iteratorGapY":"auto","markerType":"none","appearance":"outlined","itemFields":["title","subtitle"],"items":[{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-iter-0000-000000000002a-item-1773239846206-ytkrtz8","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"From reduction to contribution","subtitle":"The rationale behind the CCF: why measuring only carbon footprint is insufficient to account for real corporate climate action."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-iter-0000-000000000002a-item-1773239846206-zxf68k6","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"The three-pillar architecture","subtitle":"Complete description of pillars A (Reduction), B (Solutions), and C (Finance), their scope, sub-pillars, and source frameworks mobilized."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-iter-0000-000000000002a-item-1773239846206-i49bqcn","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"The scoring system and sector weighting","subtitle":"How the Translation Kit, credibility coefficients, and sector coefficients α, β, γ work, with numerical examples."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-iter-0000-000000000002a-item-1773239846206-xaz6al4","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"The three key results","subtitle":"Contribution potential, actual contribution, and contribution performance: how they are calculated, how to read them, and how to compare them."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-iter-0000-000000000002a-item-1773239846206-mgtl2gg","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Framework limitations","subtitle":"Excluded scopes, sector calibration assumptions, and methodological vigilance points documented by the authors."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0002-whhp-iter-0000-000000000002a-item-1773239846206-op77caj","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Future developments","subtitle":"Planned evolution axes: sector extension, integration of new frameworks, improved score granularity, and framework governance."},"innerBlocks":[]}],"responsive":{"base":{"align":"left","size":"md","paddingX":"md","paddingY":"md"}}}}]},{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-0000-0000-000000000003","blockType":"blob","data":{"eyebrow":"FAQ","title":"Frequently asked questions.","subtitle":"The most frequently asked questions about the Climate Contribution Framework, its scope, how it works, and its relationships with existing frameworks.","showContent":"true","contentType":"innerBlocks","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"2xl","gapY":"3xl","paddingX":"container-lg","paddingY":"6xl","headerPaddingX":"container-md"}}},"innerBlocks":[{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-2","iteratorGapX":"md","iteratorGapY":"md","markerType":"none","appearance":"outlined","itemFields":["title","subtitle"],"items":[{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a-item-1773239846207-m8zbcpa","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"What does the CCF measure?","subtitle":"A multidimensional framework that assesses emissions reductions in the value chain, avoided emissions through products and services, climate finance, and influence on public policies. It captures direct and indirect impacts to reflect the full spectrum of climate action."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a-item-1773239846207-huy9vry","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"How does the CCF ensure fair comparison across sectors?","subtitle":"The CCF applies context-adjusted weighting according to business sector, geography, company size, and profit margins. High-impact sectors are assessed on broader contribution ranges. This approach enables peer comparisons while reflecting structurally different roles in the transition."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a-item-1773239846207-yordd7f","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"What is the relationship between the CCF and existing frameworks?","subtitle":"The CCF is designed to complement (not replace) frameworks like SBTi or the GHG Protocol. It fills current gaps by integrating indirect impacts and climate finance, aligning with best practice methodologies, and providing a unified benchmark covering multiple frameworks."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a-item-1773239846207-2ke4z3g","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Who develops the CCF?","subtitle":"The initiative is led by Sweep and the Mirova Research Center. Methodological development is carried out with I Care by BearingPoint and Winrock International. A group of sponsoring companies supports the project, and an independent advisory committee composed of experts from leading climate organizations provides oversight."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a-item-1773239846207-ur02dui","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"What is the relationship between the CCF and the Sweep platform?","subtitle":"The CCF defines the contribution assessment methodology. Sweep provides the technology to operationalize it: data collection and consolidation, methodology application, calculation of the three indicators, scenario simulation, and action planning. The framework sets the rules, Sweep provides the digital engine."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a-item-1773239846207-9fgbapq","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"What is the long-term ambition of the CCF?","subtitle":"To establish the CCF as the global reference for corporate climate contribution, by integrating and building on existing frameworks. Ultimately, the goal is to influence public policies so that every company is required to define and publish a Contribution Plan."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"reso-0003-faqq-iter-0000-000000000003a-item-1773239846207-7lv2nfi","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Is the CCF publicly accessible?","subtitle":"Yes. The CCF is designed to be accessible to all, its development and dissemination being funded by philanthropy. The White Paper, methodological documentation, and updates are freely available."},"innerBlocks":[]}],"responsive":{"base":{"align":"left","size":"lg","paddingX":"md","paddingY":"md"}}}}]},{"id":"reso-0004-cta0-0000-0000-000000000004","blockType":"blob","data":{"title":"Want to understand // how your company // could be assessed?","subtitle":"Start the 3-minute benchmark or download the White Paper to explore the methodology in detail.","buttons":"[{\"label\":\"Start the benchmark (3 minutes)\",\"variant\":\"default\",\"theme\":\"red\",\"linkType\":\"internal\",\"internalHref\":\"\",\"opensInNewTab\":\"false\"},{\"label\":\"Download the White Paper\",\"variant\":\"ghost\",\"theme\":\"red\",\"linkType\":\"internal\",\"internalHref\":\"\",\"opensInNewTab\":\"false\"}]","showContent":"false","figureType":"none","markerType":"none","appearance":"darkBackground","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"4xl","paddingY":"7xl","headerPaddingX":"container-md"}}},"innerBlocks":[]}],"meta":{"createdAt":"2026-03-12T07:45:11.210Z","updatedAt":"2026-03-26T12:39:05.760Z"}}

This approach prioritizes the most assessment on the most material levers and prevents any compensation between structurally different pillars.","showContent":"true","contentType":"innerBlocks","appearance":"borderBottom","responsive":{"base":{"layout":"stack","align":"center","size":"2xl","gapY":"3xl","paddingX":"container-lg","paddingY":"6xl","headerPaddingX":"container-md"}}},"innerBlocks":[{"id":"meth-0007-pond-iter-0000-000000000007a","blockType":"blobIterator","data":{"iteratorLayout":"grid-3","iteratorGapX":"md","iteratorGapY":"none","markerType":"none","markerStyle":"ghost","appearance":"outlined","itemFields":["title","subtitle","markerContent"],"items":[{"id":"meth-0007-pond-iter-0000-000000000007a-item-1773239930105-i271nc2","blockType":"blob","data":{"markerContent":"α","title":"Emissions intensity","subtitle":"The weight of the Reduction pillar is correlated to the sector's carbon intensity across Scopes 1, 2, and 3. The more a sector emits, the more material the decarbonization of its operations."},"innerBlocks":[]},{"id":"meth-0007-pond-iter-0000-000000000007a-item-1773239930105-6dsh1j7","blockType":"blob","data":{"markerContent":"β","title":"Capacity to deploy solutions","subtitle":"The weight of the Solutions pillar reflects the sector's technological potential to produce goods or services enabling avoided emissions by other actors.
